_comment: Tier-2 for skfem biharmonic#0-2: ElementTriMorley has 6 DOFs per triangle (3 vertices + 3 edge midpoints), ElementTriArgyris has 21 (5th-degree polynomial), ElementQuadBFS has 16 (C1 on quad). All three are registered in skfem and Basis(mesh, elem).Nbfun matches the catalog claim. Verified empirically 2026-06-01.
